LanguageData.WorkbenchHasZoneNonStockpile: Workbench has a non-stockpile zone at its interaction cell
LanguageData.WzNoBills: This workbench has no bills, so no workbench zone can be created
LanguageData.WzCreateWorkbenchZoneDesc: Left-click to create the default rectangular workbench zone; right-click to choose rectangle or circle. The storage filter is built from all bill ingredients, and the range is the smaller of the mod max radius and the bill ingredient search radii.
